blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,635 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
